Description

Meilisearch Java client-specific runtime implementation and adapters.

    Callback interface for low level operations executed against a Meilisearch environment.

    Class
    Description
    DocumentOperations
    The operations for the Documents API.
    FacetHit
     
    MeilisearchHealth
    Health information for a Meilisearch instance.
    MeilisearchIndex
    Metadata for a Meilisearch index.
    MeilisearchIndexCreateRequest
    Request options to create a Meilisearch index.
    MeilisearchIndexList
    A page of Meilisearch indexes.
    MeilisearchIndexOperations
    Operations for APIs scoped to a single Meilisearch index.
    MeilisearchIndexQuery
    Query options to list Meilisearch indexes.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings
    Runtime settings for a Meilisearch index.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.Builder
    Builder for MeilisearchIndexSettings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.EmbedderDistributionSettings
    Embedder distribution runtime settings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.EmbedderInputType
    Embedder input type values supported by Meilisearch.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.EmbedderSettings
    Embedder runtime settings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.EmbedderSettings.EmbedderBuilder
    Builder for MeilisearchIndexSettings.EmbedderSettings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.EmbedderSource
    Embedder source values supported by Meilisearch.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.FacetingSettings
    Faceting runtime settings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.LocalizedAttributeSettings
    Localized attribute runtime settings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.PaginationSettings
    Pagination runtime settings.
    MeilisearchIndexSettings.TypoToleranceSettings
    Typo tolerance runtime settings.
    MeilisearchIndexStats
    Statistics for a Meilisearch index.
    MeilisearchIndexUpdateRequest
    Request options to update a Meilisearch index.
    MeilisearchInstanceOperations
    Operations for Meilisearch instance-level APIs.
    MeilisearchStats
    Statistics for a Meilisearch instance.
    MeilisearchVersion
    Version information for a Meilisearch instance.
    SearchHit
     
    SearchHits
     
    SearchOperations
    The operations for the below Meilisearch APIs.
    SearchPage
    Page definition for repositories that need to return a paged SearchHits.
    TotalHitsRelation
    Relation that describes how SearchHits.getTotalHits() relates to the total matching result set.
